statement: The system shall require users to authenticate with a username and password before allowing access to any protected resource.

source_trace.span: authenticate with a username and password before accessing

statement: The system shall lock a user account after five consecutive failed login attempts.

source_trace.span: lock the account after five consecutive failed login attempts

statement: The authentication response time shall not exceed 500 milliseconds under normal load.

source_trace.span: response times must remain acceptable to users
